pageContext.name: Rancor Corbel Magnet
pageContext.description: Tucked away in the ornate detailing of Jabba the Hutt's™ Sail Barge, the Khetanna™ is a fantastic tribute to the Rancor™. Almost hidden, yet on a prominent pillar in the film, this adornment is sure to thrill. Sideshow and Regal Robot are proud to present a magnetic mini-sculpture that draws inspiration from that on-set artwork.  Part of the Parts of the Galaxy Collection, Regal Robot created this magnet using high-resolution 3D scanning of the original artifact. Each approximately 5″ tall Rancor Corbel Magnet is solid resin and hand-finished with a faux bronze look by the FX artists in our New York studios. Hand-applied patina accents the amazing details and wonderful organic sculpture and makes each a unique work of art.  They're 100% made-in-the-U.S.A. and come ready to display. Like the other Star Wars™-inspired decor pieces, this rancor-themed magnet will bring some classic Star Wars style into your home, office, man-cave, or fridge today!
